mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem_record (user_id, problem_id, ansewr, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{problemId}, #{ansewr}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, problem_id, ansewr, status, create_time FROM problem_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT pr.problem_id, p.title AS problem_title, p.status AS problem_status, COUNT(*) AS wrong_count, MAX(pr.create_time) AS last_wrong_time, MIN(pr.create_time) AS create_time FROM problem_record pr LEFT JOIN problem p ON pr.problem_id = p.id WHERE pr.user_id = #{userId} AND pr.status = 0 AND (p.status = 1 OR p.status IS NULL) GROUP BY pr.problem_id, p.title, p.status ORDER BY last_wrong_time DESC
